{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33167", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 1.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact
The debug exceptions page does not properly escape exception messages. A carefully crafted exception message could inject arbitrary HTML and JavaScript into the page, leading to XSS. This affects applications with detailed exception pages enabled (`config.consider_all_requests_local = true`), which is the default in development.

### Releases
The fixed releases are available at the normal locations.

### Credit
This issue was responsibly reported by Hackerone researcher [fbettag](https://hackerone.com/fbettag).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00401, "percentile": 0.31707}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-23T20:45:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33167"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-23T23:17:12Z", "published_at": "2026-03-23T20:45:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/rails/rails/security/advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "https://github.com/rails/rails/commit/6752711c8c31d79ba50d13af6a6698a3b85415e0", "https://github.com/rails/rails/releases/tag/v8.1.2.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33167", "https://github.com/rubysec/ruby-advisory-db/blob/master/gems/actionpack/CVE-2026-33167.yml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/rails/rails/security-advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/rails/rails", "summary": "Rails has a possible XSS vulnerability in its Action Pack debug exceptions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T16:14:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.1.2.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "actionpack"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 8.1.0, < 8.1.2.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
